content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt says "TaskTide public beta" and "still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), which may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple treats App Store builds as finished products, so store-facing copy calling the release a "beta" or "still testing" can signal the app is unfinished and invite rejection under 2.2. The release notes here explicitly market the build as a public beta with "rough edges." Consider rewriting to describe the shipped features neutrally and route any true beta testing through TestFlight.
